/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libmna_solver.so.2 -o lib/libmna_solver.so.2.5.0 CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/src/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/src/solver/core.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/src/solver/dc.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/src/solver/ac.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/src/solver/transient.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/elements/passive.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/elements/sources.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_shared.dir/elements/nonlinear/nonlinear.c.o  -lm
